Vibe: Divine main character energy. Features literal glowing halos and a "chosen one" savior complex.
The edgy, brooding anti-hero. Think Alucard or Vampire Hunter D but with optimal min-maxed stats.
Pure shonen dragon warrior muscle. Loud, breathes fire, and looks like a terrifying boss monster.
The classic misunderstood rival. Dual-wielding, dark aesthetic, and constant internal monologue about shadows.
The gruff, tanky blacksmith archetype. Unshakable resolve, loves gold, and yells loudly during battle.
Ethereal, seasonal magical girl or boy. Changes elements based on their mood swings and current feelings.
Elegant, timeless archer prodigy. Moves with absolute grace while looking down on everyone else.
The hyperactive, chaotic mad scientist. Constantly building explosive gadgets that work exactly half the time.
The versatile "Jack of all trades" protagonist. Fits into any guild and learns any skill instantly.
Pure physical power and gym-bro energy. Solves every single problem by punching it directly in the face.
Sneaky, lucky thief archetype. Eats five meals a day but dodges literal lightning bolts with ease.

Vibe Description: The relatable everyman hero. No flashy powers, just raw determination, grit, and plot armor.

Vibe: Beast-mode transformation sequence. Activates feral rage, grows claws, and unleashes the inner wild animal.
The hyper-fast, zoomies-fueled cat-person. Parks on high ledges and attacks with overwhelming speed.
Stylized demon-blood rebel. Flashy fire magic, sharp horns, and a mischievous, Smug-face attitude.
Mecha anime protagonist. A sentient robot searching for a soul while tanking heavy artillery.
Wild, forest-dwelling survivalist. Lives in nature, speaks to animals, and runs incredibly fast through trees.
Dual-wielding holy avenger. Relentless zealot who hunts down evil with absolute, blinding fury.
Sentient Gundam paladin. Literally built for holy warfare, heavy armor, and executing absolute justice.
Eldritch magical girl. Channels volatile, multi-colored chaos magic from a highly questionable patron.
Forbidden magic specialist. Signed a shady contract for ultimate power and acts completely smug about it.
The underground illusions master. Sneaky wizard who manipulates reality while hiding in plain sight.
Radiant sun priest. Shoats massive beams of blinding holy light to vaporize entire armies of undead.
Stoic, chivalrous knight captain. Commands the battlefield with inspiring speeches and heavy shield bashes.
Berserker wolverine energy. Lunges across the screen in a blurry frenzy of claws and screams.
Flashy, violin-playing trickster. Performs elegant musical solos while setting the entire room on fire.
Chain-spinning ninja assassin. Teleports through shadows and sweeps enemies off their feet with spiked chains.
High-speed acrobatic scout. Vaults off walls with a quarterstaff, moving way too fast to track.
